metadata.title: Build an srx_ace_audit_agent for research_agent that validates market_lens data and blocks unsupported ROI claims.

mission.primary_objective: Build an srx_ace_audit_agent for research_agent that validates market_lens data and blocks unsupported ROI claims.
mission.success_definition: Agent correctly identifies unsupported_roi_claim in at least 3 test cases. Produces a repair receipt with missing context fields. Blocks execution when certainty < 0.95.

in_scope.item: Audit agent must process market_lens inputs, flag unsupported_roi_claim patterns, and generate a repair receipt. Excludes financial forecasting or legal compliance.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent correctly identifies unsupported_roi_claim in at least 3 test cases. Produces a repair receipt with missing context fields. Blocks execution when certainty < 0.95.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.audit_scope: Build an srx_ace_audit_agent for research_agent that validates market_lens data and blocks unsupported ROI claims.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_policy: Use source evidence and mark unsupported claims.

inspection_steps.item: Audit agent must process market_lens inputs, flag unsupported_roi_claim patterns, and generate a repair receipt. Excludes financial forecasting or legal compliance.

findings_contract.item: Agent correctly identifies unsupported_roi_claim in at least 3 test cases. Produces a repair receipt with missing context fields. Blocks execution when certainty < 0.95.

receipt_contract.item: blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty: unsupported_roi_claim cannot be validated without market_lens data source. Repair receipt issued.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim as chaos input type, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot validate ROI claim without market_lens data source or clear success metrics. Blocking to prevent hallucinated compliance or financial advice. Repair receipt: require explicit market_lens dataset reference, define acceptance criteria as measurable thresholds, and replace urgent language with structured timeline.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
